doc_title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status and Completion of Treasury Stock Acquisition
summary_en: 33,400 shares acquired (0.43% of shares outstanding) for ¥75.61M during May 1–14, 2026. Execution period May 1–31, 2026 at ¥226,700 average price. Cumulative acquisition under March 11, 2026 board resolution (¥200M authorization): 88,800 shares for ¥199.93M. Program completed; 11,200 shares of ¥200M authorization remain unexecuted.
summary_jp: 33,400株（発行済み株式の0.43%）を2026年5月1日～14日に¥75,610,800で取得。平均取得価格は¥226,700。2026年3月11日の取締役会決議による¥200M枠での累計取得は88,800株¥199,933,100。プログラム終了。未実行残高¥11,200。
tag_en: Buyback - 33,400 shares (0.43% S/O) - ¥75.61M - Completion notice - Open market
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 - 33,400株（発行済み株式の0.43%）- ¥75,610,800 - 取得終了 - 市場買付
